_help: Modifica solo i testi dopo i due punti. Mantieni virgolette, virgole e parentesi esattamente come sono.
name: LACLY
shortDescription: I'm Lacly. I turn rhythm, imagery, and sound into edits that leave a mark.
longDescription: I create high-impact videos for creators, brands, and communities. Every edit starts with a clear idea: find the right rhythm, build tension, and give every frame a reason to be there.
styleDescription: My style blends precise sync, cinematic atmosphere, and dynamic typography. From the chaos of a gaming edit to the tension of an anime sequence, I always aim for a distinct visual identity.
heroTitle: I cut the noise. I leave a mark.
heroText: Editing, sound design, and motion typography for stories worth replaying.
featuredText: A selection of personal edits and commissioned projects, built frame by frame.
strengthsText: Every project balances technique, instinct, and a slightly unreasonable number of replays.
contactTitle: Need an edit? Open a ticket.
contactText: Commissions are managed through Lacly's Discord ticket system. Join the server, open a private ticket, and send the idea, references, deadline, format, and budget range.
